ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator of the project */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Funding agency for the project */,
  "grant_number" TEXT /* Grant number for the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sequences" (
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sequence */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the sequence belongs to */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* RNA sequence */,
  "bp_percentage" REAL /* Base-pairing percentage */,
  "ensemble_diversity" REAL /* Ensemble diversity */,
  "fe_per" REAL /* Free energy per base pair */,
  "gc_percentage" REAL /* GC percentage */,
  "pos_entropy" REAL /* Positional entropy */,
  "expected_accuracy" REAL /* Expected accuracy of secondary structure prediction */,
  "dp" TEXT /* Dot-bracket notation of the predicted secondary structure */,
  "sequence_length" INTEGER /* Length of the RNA sequence */,
  "sequence_type" TEXT /* Type of RNA sequence (e.g., mRNA, tRNA, rRNA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sequences_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "prop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property record */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the properties belong to */,
  "ent_3" REAL /* Entropy at position 3 */,
  "ent_4" REAL /* Entropy at position 4 */,
  "ent_5" REAL /* Entropy at position 5 */,
  "ent_6" REAL /* Entropy at position 6 */,
  "ent_7" REAL /* Entropy at position 7 */,
  "ent_8" REAL /* Entropy at position 8 */,
  "dangling_energy" REAL /* Dangling energy of the sequence */,
  "internal_loop_energy" REAL /* Internal loop energy of the sequence */,
  "bulge_loop_energy" REAL /* Bulge loop energy of the sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prop_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin, data analyst) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_users" (
  "project_user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-user relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the user in the project (e.g., lead, collaborator) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_users_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being analyzed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., secondary structure prediction, property calculation) */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_params" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis (e.g., energy model, algorithm) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed analysis) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the visualization belongs to */,
  "viz_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., RNA structure, property plot) */,
  "viz_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the visualization file in MB */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "viz_title" TEXT /* Title of the visualization */,
  "viz_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project initiating the collaboration */,
  "collaborating_project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaborating project */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was initiated */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, pending, completed) */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., data sharing, joint analysis) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_collaborating_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaborating_project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project being accessed */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the project or sequence */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the project or sequence was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the comment is associated with */,
  "seq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sequence the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment (e.g., general, question, suggestion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_seq_id FOREIGN KEY ("seq_id") REFERENCES sequences ("seq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newsfeeds" (
  "newsfeed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newsfeed */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the newsfeed is associated with */,
  "newsfeed_date" TEXT /* Date the newsfeed was posted */,
  "newsfeed_text" TEXT /* Text of the newsfeed */,
  "newsfeed_link" TEXT /* Link to the newsfeed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newsfeed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_newsfeeds_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faqs" (
  "faq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FAQ */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the FAQ is associated with */,
  "question" TEXT /* Question */,
  "answer" TEXT /* Answer */,
  "faq_date" TEXT /* Date the FAQ was posted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faqs_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)
